title: pub use re-exports create dual canonical paths for all major types
description: lib.rs now exports Id, Session, UTCDate, ClientError, JmapChatClient, SessionClient, and all auth providers at the crate root, but the original module paths (jmap_chat::jmap::Id, jmap_chat::client::JmapChatClient, etc.) remain public. Both paths resolve to the same type but rustdoc generates duplicate entries and error messages show inconsistent paths, causing recurring contributor confusion about which import to use.
